title: White Grout Pen, 6ml - Easy Application, Mould Resistant & Waterproof, Instantly Brightens Discoloured Grout, Single Piece
features: INSTANT UPGRADE: No need to wait for dry times or deal with complex instructions. With our white grout pen, you can see the results immediately. Quick-drying and efficient, it’s the ideal solution for busy homeowners looking to freshen up their space quickly.

MOULD RESISTANT & WATERPROOF: Designed with durability in mind, our grout pen not only transforms your tiles but also protects them. The formula is resistant to mold and water, ensuring your grout stays cleaner and brighter for longer.

EFFORTLESS APPLICATION: Forget about complicated tools and processes. Our grout pen is crafted for easy usage. Apply directly onto grout lines with no mess and fuss. It’s the perfect DIY tool for a quick home improvement project.

REVIVE YOUR TILES: Bring back the clean, sharp look of your tiles with our white grout pen. Perfect for instantly brightening discolored grout and making your bathroom, kitchen, or any tiled area look like new.

LONG-LASTING COVERAGE: Enjoy wide coverage of up to 50 meters from each 6ml pen, enabling you to refresh an extensive area of grout lines with a single pen. Ideal for both small touch-ups and large-scale renovations.
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION: Premium quality easy to use grout pen is mould resistant and waterproof, and contains a total of 6ml. Ingredients Grout Safety Warning No warning applicable See more
